---
title: Improved annular mode variability in a global atmospheric general circulation
  model with 16 km horizontal resolution
pagetitle: 2013-9-1-Palipane2013 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2013
author: Erool Palipane, Jian Lu, Gang Chen and James L. Kinter
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 40, 4893--4899, doi:10.1002/grl.50649.
recommended_citation: 'Erool Palipane, Jian Lu, Gang Chen and James L. Kinter, 2013:
  Improved annular mode variability in a global atmospheric general circulation model
  with 16 km horizontal resolution, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 40, 4893--4899,
  doi:10.1002/grl.50649.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/grl.50649
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Improved annular mode variability in a global atmospheric general circulation model with 16 km horizontal resolution

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2013*

**Recommended citation:** Erool Palipane, Jian Lu, Gang Chen and James L. Kinter, 2013: Improved annular mode variability in a global atmospheric general circulation model with 16 km horizontal resolution, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 40, 4893--4899, doi:10.1002/grl.50649.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/grl.50649){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
